'''zhodhashaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:hiddenmost|hiddenmost]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-dh-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hiddenmost|hiddenmost]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhodhashaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhodhashithi|zhodhashithi]] || [[word:zhodhashiji|zhodhashiji]] || [[word:zhodhashishi|zhodhashishi]] || [[word:zhodhashiki|zhodhashiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhodhashuthuthu|zhodhashuthuthu]] || [[word:zhodhashujuju|zhodhashujuju]] || [[word:zhodhashushushu|zhodhashushushu]] || [[word:zhodhashukuku|zhodhashukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhodhashuthu|zhodhashuthu]] || [[word:zhodhashuju|zhodhashuju]] || [[word:zhodhashushu|zhodhashushu]] || [[word:zhodhashuku|zhodhashuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhodhashufthuf|zhodhashufthuf]] || [[word:zhodhashufjuf|zhodhashufjuf]] || [[word:zhodhashufshuf|zhodhashufshuf]] || [[word:zhodhashufkuf|zhodhashufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhodhashethe|zhodhashethe]] || [[word:zhodhasheje|zhodhasheje]] || [[word:zhodhasheshe|zhodhasheshe]] || [[word:zhodhasheke|zhodhasheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhodhashothotho|zhodhashothotho]] || [[word:zhodhashojojo|zhodhashojojo]] || [[word:zhodhashoshosho|zhodhashoshosho]] || [[word:zhodhashokoko|zhodhashokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhodhashotho|zhodhashotho]] || [[word:zhodhashojo|zhodhashojo]] || [[word:zhodhashosho|zhodhashosho]] || [[word:zhodhashoko|zhodhashoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhodhashofthof|zhodhashofthof]] || [[word:zhodhashofjof|zhodhashofjof]] || [[word:zhodhashofshof|zhodhashofshof]] || [[word:zhodhashofkof|zhodhashofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhodhashĂŻfthĂŻf|zhodhashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhodhashĂŻfjĂŻf|zhodhashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhodhashĂŻfshĂŻf|zhodhashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhodhashĂŻfkĂŻf|zhodhashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhodhashĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|zhodhashĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhodhashĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|zhodhashĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhodhashĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|zhodhashĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhodhashĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|zhodhashĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhodhashĂŻfthĂŻf|zhodhashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhodhashĂŻfjĂŻf|zhodhashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhodhashĂŻfshĂŻf|zhodhashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhodhashĂŻfkĂŻf|zhodhashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhodhashĂŻfthĂŻf|zhodhashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhodhashĂŻfjĂŻf|zhodhashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhodhashĂŻfshĂŻf|zhodhashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhodhashĂŻfkĂŻf|zhodhashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhodhashĂŠthĂŠ|zhodhashĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zhodhashĂŠjĂŠ|zhodhashĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zhodhashĂŠshĂŠ|zhodhashĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zhodhashĂŠkĂŠ|zhodhashĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhodhashathatha|zhodhashathatha]] || [[word:zhodhashajaja|zhodhashajaja]] || [[word:zhodhashashasha|zhodhashashasha]] || [[word:zhodhashakaka|zhodhashakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhodhashatha|zhodhashatha]] || [[word:zhodhashaja|zhodhashaja]] || [[word:zhodhashasha|zhodhashasha]] || [[word:zhodhashaka|zhodhashaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhodhashafthaf|zhodhashafthaf]] || [[word:zhodhashafjaf|zhodhashafjaf]] || [[word:zhodhashafshaf|zhodhashafshaf]] || [[word:zhodhashafkaf|zhodhashafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zhodhashasha|zhodhashasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhodhashĂ«sha|zhodhashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhodhashrosha|zhodhashrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhodhashmusha|zhodhashmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhodhashyasha|zhodhashyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhodhashnkshĂ«sha|gozhodhashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhodhashnkrosha|gozhodhashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhodhashnkmusha|gozhodhashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhodhashnkyasha|gozhodhashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zhodhadhashasha|zhodhadhashasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhodhadhashĂ«sha|zhodhadhashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhodhadhashrosha|zhodhadhashrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhodhadhashmusha|zhodhadhashmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhodhadhashyasha|zhodhadhashyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhodhadhashnkshĂ«sha|gozhodhadhashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhodhadhashnkrosha|gozhodhadhashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhodhadhashnkmusha|gozhodhadhashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhodhadhashnkyasha|gozhodhadhashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zhedhĂŠshasha|zhedhĂŠshasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhedhĂŠshĂ«sha|zhedhĂŠshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhedhĂŠshrosha|zhedhĂŠshrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhedhĂŠshmusha|zhedhĂŠshmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhedhĂŠshyasha|zhedhĂŠshyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhedhĂŠshnkshĂ«sha|gozhedhĂŠshnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhedhĂŠshnkrosha|gozhedhĂŠshnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhedhĂŠshnkmusha|gozhedhĂŠshnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhedhĂŠshnkyasha|gozhedhĂŠshnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zhodhfashasha|zhodhfashasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhodhfashĂ«sha|zhodhfashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhodhfashrosha|zhodhfashrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhodhfashmusha|zhodhfashmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhodhfashyasha|zhodhfashyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhodhfashnkshĂ«sha|gozhodhfashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhodhfashnkrosha|gozhodhfashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhodhfashnkmusha|gozhodhfashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhodhfashnkyasha|gozhodhfashnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
